hero.titleStart: The Proxy-Free Safe Pause & Resume Layer
hero.subtitle: Stop rogue agents in RAM, save their state, and resume safely. The elegant, in-process alternative to LiteLLM and Portkey. 2 lines of code. No proxies.

codeSplit.title: From Panic to Control in 2 Lines.
codeSplit.subtitle: Stop wiring callbacks, decorators, and custom loggers. AeneasSoft intercepts every LLM call at the HTTP level — and blocks the dangerous ones in RAM.
codeSplit.afterComment: # Every LLM call monitored. Rogue agents blocked in RAM.
codeSplit.afterHint: Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Mistral, Groq, Cohere, Together AI, Fireworks, Azure, Ollama.

features.title: Active Defense for Multi-Agent Systems.
features.subtitle: Not just observability. Active protection for your AI agents in production.

items.title: In-Process Safe Pause & Resume.
items.description: Blocks runaway agents in RAM, saves state via on_block hook, and resumes safely. No proxy. No network roundtrip. No single point of failure. Fully open source.

items.title: Understand Agent Behavior Instantly.
items.description: Stop digging through JSON logs. See exactly why your agent made a decision with interactive causal execution graphs. No more black boxes.

items.title: Stop Agent Budget Drain.
items.description: Know precisely which agent spent $47.30 and why. Real-time per-agent, per-model cost breakdowns. Set budget limits that actually block.

items.title: EU AI Act Ready. (Enterprise)
items.description: Generate RSA-signed Article 12 compliance reports with one click. Be audit-ready by design, not by panic. Available as Enterprise feature.

socialProof.title: The Universal Interceptor for AI Agents.
socialProof.subtitle: One interceptor. All providers. Zero configuration.
socialProof.quote: We needed to understand our multi-agent systems, not just monitor them. AeneasSoft's HTTP-level interception gave us that control, instantly.

euAiAct.title: EU AI Act Article 12:
euAiAct.subtitle: Is your AI system ready?
euAiAct.description: Article 12 requires automatic logging of AI system events. AeneasSoft gives you that — plus active defense. Enterprise customers get RSA-signed compliance reports.

items.a: Because developers don't trust black-box tools that intercept their HTTP traffic. Our entire SDK, interceptor, and circuit breaker are MIT-licensed. Read every line. Audit everything. The method is patent-protected, but the code is yours to inspect.

items.q: What's the difference between AeneasSoft and LiteLLM/Portkey?
items.a: LiteLLM and Portkey route your traffic through an external proxy server. Your request leaves your process, hits their proxy, then goes to OpenAI. AeneasSoft runs inside your process — no proxy, no added latency, no single point of failure. And we can pause agents, save state, and resume safely — not just block them.

items.q: How does the interceptor work without code changes?
items.a: We patch HTTP transport libraries (httpx, requests, aiohttp in Python; node:http/node:https in Node.js) at the lowest level. Every outgoing call to AI providers is automatically captured — regardless of which framework sits on top.

items.q: Does it work with LangChain / CrewAI / AutoGen?
items.a: Yes. Because we intercept at the HTTP level, we work with any framework. No callbacks, no plugins. If it makes HTTP calls to an AI provider, we see it.

Non-streaming calls are captured with 100% accuracy. For streaming calls (stream=True), we capture the initial request and final usage summary (tokens + cost). Full chunk-level tracing ships in Q3 2026.

Yes. All data is encrypted in transit (TLS) and at rest. Enable Zero Data Retention mode to store only metadata — no prompts or outputs. EU servers only (Hetzner, Germany). And the code is open source — verify it yourself.

finalCta.subtitle: Open source. No vendor lock-in. 2 lines of code. Full active defense in under 2 minutes.

product.title: The Platform for Active AI Agent Defense.
product.subtitle: Open source code. Patent-protected method. Enterprise-grade protection.

sections.title: For Developers: Open source. Audit the code. Trust the tool.
sections.description: The entire SDK is MIT-licensed. Read every line of the circuit breaker, the state machine, and the recovery logic. Two lines of code for instant protection. No decorators, no callbacks, no boilerplate. If you don't trust it, don't install it — but you can verify everything first.

sections.title: For CTOs: Active Defense, not passive observation.
sections.description: Other tools observe after the damage. AeneasSoft blocks in RAM, saves state via on_block hook, and resumes safely. Set budget limits per agent. If an agent goes rogue, it gets paused — not crashed. The proxy-free alternative to LiteLLM and Portkey.

sections.title: For Compliance: Enterprise-grade Article 12 reporting.
sections.description: Automated EU AI Act reports with RSA-2048 signed PDFs. Zero Data Retention mode for ironclad GDPR conformity. Document traceable AI decisions with one click. Available as Enterprise feature.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Everything you need to install, configure, and run AeneasSoft.
docs.quickstartIntro: Get your first trace and activate Active Defense in under 2 minutes.
docs.step4Code:
from openai import OpenAI
client = OpenAI()
response = client.chat.completions.create(
    model="gpt-4",
    messages=[{"role": "user", "content": "Hello"}]
)
# Trace captured. Agent defended. You're in control.
docs.streamingContent: Non-streaming calls are captured with 100% accuracy. For streaming calls (stream=True), we capture the initial request and final usage summary (tokens + cost), but not individual chunks. Full chunk-level streaming tracing ships in Q3 2026.
docs.honestBoundariesContent: We believe transparency about limitations builds more trust than hiding them behind 'Beta' labels. Non-streaming calls: 100% accurate. Streaming calls: request + final usage captured, not individual chunks. Cost calculation: list prices for 20+ models (batch/cached/fine-tuned rates not reflected). Each process needs its own init() call (no central proxy config). We test against pinned library versions and ship SDK updates within 48 hours of breaking changes.
docs.activeDefenseContent: Block runaway agents in RAM, save state, resume safely. Active Defense monitors cost, error rate, and call frequency with a full state machine (CLOSED → OPEN → PAUSED → HALF_OPEN).
docs.selfHostContent: Run AeneasSoft locally with Docker. No cloud dependency. No account needed.
docs.selfHostMinimal:
docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml up -d
# Backend: http://localhost:3001
# ClickHouse only. No Kafka. No auth.
docs.selfHostFull:
docker compose up -d
# Full stack: ClickHouse + Kafka + Backend + Proxy
# Configure via .env file
docs.frameworksContent: AeneasSoft works with every framework automatically — no plugins needed.
docs.frameworkLangchain:
from langchain.chat_models import ChatOpenAI
import agentwatch
agentwatch.init()

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4")
result = llm.invoke("Hello")
# Trace captured automatically — no callbacks needed
docs.frameworkCrewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew
import agentwatch
agentwatch.init()

agent = Agent(role="Researcher", goal="Find data")
# All LLM calls by CrewAI agents are traced automatically
docs.frameworkDirect:
import httpx
import agentwatch
agentwatch.init()

# Even raw HTTP calls are captured:
resp = httpx.post("https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions", ...)
# Trace captured at HTTP transport level
docs.apiRefContent: All endpoints accept JSON. Authentication via JWT token or X-API-Key header. In LOCAL_MODE, no auth required.

about.title: About AeneasSoft: Open Source Active Defense for AI Agents.
about.mission: We believe AI agents are powerful — and dangerous when uncontrolled. AeneasSoft is the open-source safety layer: the first in-process circuit breaker that blocks rogue agents, saves their state, and resumes safely. We combine patent-protected technology with full code transparency, because developers shouldn't have to choose between security and trust.
about.openSource: Our entire SDK is MIT-licensed. The circuit breaker, the state machine, the recovery logic — read every line. The architecture is patent-protected (USPTO Provisional), but the code is yours to audit. Built in Germany, hosted on EU servers, GDPR-compliant from day one.
about.founderText: Founded by an AI developer who got tired of watching agents burn money at 3am. AeneasSoft exists because no other tool could block a rogue agent in RAM before the request left the process. So we built one. Open source. Patent pending. No excuses.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
PRIVACY POLICY

Last updated: April 2026

1. Controller
Leonhard Hampe, Jakobistraße 3, 30163 Hannover, Germany
Email: leonhard.hampe@aeneassoft.com

2. Data We Process and Purposes

a) Registration:
Email address and password (encrypted).
Purpose: Provision of the user account.
Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR.

b) AI Agent Traces:
AeneasSoft processes metadata of AI API calls on behalf of the customer (model, token count, latency, cost, timestamps). Prompts and responses are only stored when Zero Data Retention mode is DISABLED.
Retention: 30 days (configurable).
Legal basis: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR, Art. 28 GDPR.

c) Payment Data:
Payments are processed via Stripe Inc., certified PCI DSS Level 1. Stripe DPA with Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) is in place.

3. Data Processing (Art. 28 GDPR)
AeneasSoft processes AI agent data as a data processor for its customers. A Data Processing Agreement (DPA) is available on request: leonhard.hampe@aeneassoft.com

4. Service Providers and Sub-Processors

Hetzner Online GmbH (Hosting)
Industriestr. 25, 91710 Gunzenhausen
Server location: Germany (EU)
DPA: in place, ISO 27001 certified

Stripe Inc. (Payment processing)
354 Oyster Point Blvd, South San Francisco
Data transfer to the US via SCCs
DPA: automatically part of the Stripe agreement

Resend Inc. (Email delivery)
2261 Market Street, San Francisco
Data transfer to the US via SCCs and EU-U.S. DPF
DPA: available and agreed

5. Zero Data Retention Mode
In Zero Data Retention mode, prompts and responses of AI agents are not stored. Only metadata (model, token count, latency, cost) is processed. This option is available to all Enterprise customers.

6. Data Retention
Account data: until account deletion
AI traces: 30 days (default, configurable)
Payment data: per Stripe policies
Alert history: 30 days

7. Your Rights (Art. 15-21 GDPR)
You have the right to: access (Art. 15), rectification (Art. 16), erasure (Art. 17), restriction of processing (Art. 18), data portability (Art. 20), and objection (Art. 21).

Contact: leonhard.hampe@aeneassoft.com

8. Supervisory Authority
You have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection authority:
Der Bundesbeauftragte für den Datenschutz und die Informationsfreiheit (BfDI)
Graurheindorfer Str. 153, 53117 Bonn
https://www.bfdi.bund.de

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
Terms of Service — AeneasSoft

Last updated: April 2026

1. Service Description
AeneasSoft provides an open-source AI Agent Active Defense platform consisting of: an MIT-licensed SDK (interceptor + circuit breaker), a cloud-hosted dashboard, and API services for trace ingestion, analysis and compliance reporting.

2. Open Source SDK
The open-source SDK (agentwatch) is provided under MIT License ('AS IS', without warranty of any kind). No warranty is given for fitness for a particular purpose.

3. Data Processing
AeneasSoft processes personal data on behalf of the customer as a data processor under Art. 28 GDPR. A Data Processing Agreement (DPA) is available on request.

4. Pricing
All prices are exclusive of applicable VAT (Mehrwertsteuer). Current pricing is displayed at aeneassoft.com/pricing.

5. Price Changes
AeneasSoft reserves the right to change prices with 30 days notice. Existing subscriptions are adjusted to new prices at the end of the current billing period.

6. EU AI Act Compliance
AeneasSoft provides technical tools to support EU AI Act compliance. Legal responsibility for EU AI Act adherence remains with the customer. AeneasSoft assumes no liability for regulatory decisions regarding the customer's AI systems.

7. Liability (B2B)
Liability for slight negligence is excluded in B2B relationships, except where cardinal obligations (Kardinalpflichten) are violated. Liability is limited to the amount paid in the month preceding the damage event.

8. Plan Limits
- Open Source: 10,000 traces/month (self-hosted: unlimited)
- Cloud: 100,000 traces/month
- Enterprise: Unlimited (custom agreement)

Exceeding plan limits results in HTTP 429 responses until the next billing cycle.

9. Termination
Either party may terminate with 30 days notice. Upon termination, data is deleted within 30 days unless legally required to retain.

10. Governing Law
These terms are governed by the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany.

dpa.title: Data Processing Agreement
dpa.content:
AUFTRAGSVERARBEITUNGSVERTRAG
gem. Art. 28 DSGVO

zwischen

AeneasSoft (Leonhard Hampe, Jakobistraße 3, 30163 Hannover)
— Auftragsverarbeiter —

und

[KUNDENNAME, ADRESSE]
— Verantwortlicher —

§1 Gegenstand
AeneasSoft verarbeitet im Auftrag des Verantwortlichen folgende personenbezogene Daten:
- AI-Agent-Traces (Metadaten, optional: Prompts/Outputs)
- Zweck: Observability und Debugging von AI-Systemen

§2 Weisungsgebundenheit
Der Auftragsverarbeiter verarbeitet Daten nur auf dokumentierte Weisung des Verantwortlichen.

§3 Technische und organisatorische Massnahmen
- Verschluesselung in Transit (TLS 1.3) und at Rest (AES-256)
- Zugriffskontrolle (API Keys, JWT-basierte Authentifizierung)
- Datenloeschung nach 30 Tagen (konfigurierbar)
- Zero Data Retention Modus verfuegbar
- Server-Standort: EU (Hetzner, Deutschland)

§4 Unterauftragsverarbeiter
- Hetzner Online GmbH (Hosting, EU)
- Stripe Inc. (Zahlungsabwicklung, SCCs)
- Resend Inc. (E-Mail-Versand, SCCs)

§5 Betroffenenrechte
Der Auftragsverarbeiter unterstuetzt den Verantwortlichen bei der Erfuellung von Auskunfts-, Loesch- und Berichtigungsanfragen gemaess Art. 15-21 DSGVO.

§6 Laufzeit und Kuendigung
Dieser Vertrag gilt fuer die Dauer der Nutzung der AeneasSoft-Dienste. Bei Beendigung werden alle personenbezogenen Daten innerhalb von 30 Tagen geloescht.

Fuer eine unterschriebene Version kontaktieren Sie: leonhard.hampe@aeneassoft.com
